    23→	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
    24→	courseId := r.PathValue("courseId")
    25→
    26→	if courseId == "" {
    27→		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusBadRequest)

    49→		return

    51→
    52→	if enrollmentBodyParams.UserId == "" {
    53→		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusBadRequest)
    54→		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"code": validation.InputValidationError, "message": "userId must be required"})
    55→		return
    56→	}
    57→
    58→	if !uuidRegex.MatchString(enrollmentBodyParams.UserId) {
    59→		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusBadRequest)
    60→		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"code": validation.InputValidationError, "message": "userId must be UUID format"})
    61→		return
    62→	}
    63→
    64→	topicId, err := h.usecase.execute(EnrollCourseUsecaseParams{
    65→		ctx:           r.Context(),
    66→		userId:        enrollmentBodyParams.UserId,
    67→		courseId:      courseId,
    68→		sectionNumber: enrollmentBodyParams.SectionNumber,
    69→		topicNumber:   enrollmentBodyParams.TopicNumber,
    70→	})
    71→
    72→	if err == ErrTopicNumberRequireSectionNumber {
    73→		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusBadRequest)
    74→		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"code": validation.InputValidationError, "message": "topic number require section number"})
    75→		return

    80→		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"code": validation.InputValidationError, "message": "enrollment number is not found"})
    81→		return
    82→	}

    86→		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)

    88→		return
    89→	}

    91→	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)

     4→	"context"

    10→)
    11→
    12→type SqrcCourseRepository struct {
    13→	sqrc db.Querier
    14→}
    15→
    16→func NewSqrcCourseRepository(q db.Querier) *SqrcCourseRepository {
    17→	return &SqrcCourseRepository{sqrc: q}
    18→}
    19→
    20→func (repository *SqrcCourseRepository) getCourseByCourseId(ctx context.Context, courseId string) (Course, error) {
    21→	var courseIdUuid pgtype.UUID
    22→
    23→	if err := courseIdUuid.Scan(courseId); err != nil {
    24→		return Course{}, err
    25→	}
    26→
    27→	courseRaw, err := repository.sqrc.GetCourseById(ctx, courseIdUuid)
    28→	if err != nil {
    29→		return Course{}, err
    30→	}
    31→
    32→	return toCourse(courseRaw), nil
    33→}
    34→
    35→func toCourse(raw db.GetCourseByIdRow) Course {
    36→	var tags []string
    37→	json.Unmarshal(raw.Tags, &tags)
    38→
    39→	type topicRaw struct {
    40→		CourseSectionTopicId string `json:"course_section_topic_id"`
    41→		Title                string `json:"title"`
    42→		Description          string `json:"description"`
    43→		Prerequisites        string `json:"prerequisites"`
    44→		Knowledge            string `json:"knowledge"`
    45→		Flow                 string `json:"flow"`
    46→		Quiz                 string `json:"quiz"`
    47→		CompletionCriteria   string `json:"completion_criteria"`
    48→	}
    49→	type sectionRaw struct {
    50→		CourseSectionId string     `json:"course_section_id"`
    51→		Title           string     `json:"title"`
    52→		Description     string     `json:"description"`
    53→		Topics          []topicRaw `json:"topics"`
    54→	}
    55→
    56→	var sectionsRaw []sectionRaw
    57→	json.Unmarshal(raw.Sections, &sectionsRaw)
    58→
    59→	sections := make([]Section, len(sectionsRaw))
    60→	for i, s := range sectionsRaw {
    61→		topics := make([]Topic, len(s.Topics))
    62→		for j, t := range s.Topics {
    63→			topics[j] = Topic{
    64→				topicId:            t.CourseSectionTopicId,
    65→				title:              t.Title,
    66→				description:        t.Description,
    67→				prerequisites:      t.Prerequisites,
    68→				knowledge:          t.Knowledge,
    69→				flow:               t.Flow,
    70→				quiz:               t.Quiz,
    71→				completionCriteria: t.CompletionCriteria,
    72→				number:             j,
    73→			}
    74→		}
    75→		sections[i] = Section{
    76→			sectionId:   s.CourseSectionId,
    77→			title:       s.Title,
    78→			description: s.Description,
    79→			number:      i,
    80→			topics:      topics,
    81→		}
    82→	}
    83→
    84→	var publishedAt *string
    85→	if raw.PublishedAt.Valid {
    86→		t := raw.PublishedAt.Time.Format(time.RFC3339)
    87→		publishedAt = &t
    88→	}
    89→
    90→	return Course{
    91→		courseId:      raw.CourseID.String(),
    92→		title:         raw.Title,
    93→		description:   raw.Description,
    94→		slug:          raw.Slug,
    95→		tags:          tags,
    96→		publishStatus: raw.PublishStatus,
    97→		category: Category{
    98→			categoryId: raw.CategoryID.String(),
    99→			name:       raw.CategoryName,
   100→		},
   101→		publishedAt: publishedAt,
   102→		author: Author{
   103→			authorId: raw.AuthorID.String(),
   104→			name:     raw.AuthorName,
   105→		},
   106→		visibility: raw.Visibility,
   107→		sections:   sections,
   108→	}
   109→}

-- USERS
CREATE TABLE users (
    user_id UUID,
    nickname TEXT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_users PRIMARY KEY (user_id)
);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_users_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON users FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

-- APIKEYS
CREATE TABLE apikeys (
    key_hash TEXT,
    user_id UUID NOT NULL,
    plain_suffix TEXT NOT NULL,
    expired_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_apikeys PRIMARY KEY (key_hash),
    CONSTRAINT fk_apikeys_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_apikeys_user_id ON apikeys USING BTREE (user_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_apikeys_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON apikeys FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

-- COURSE SECTION
CREATE TABLE course_sections (
    course_section_id UUID,
    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    index SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_course_sections PRIMARY KEY (course_section_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_course_sections_course_id_index UNIQUE (course_id, index) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
);

CREATE INDEX idx_course_sections_course_id ON course_sections USING BTREE (course_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_course_sections_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON course_sections FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

-- COURSE SECTION TOPIC
CREATE TABLE course_section_topics (
    course_section_topic_id UUID,
    -- course_id は course_section と JOIN することで辿れるが、クエリ効率のため非正規化
    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    course_section_id UUID NOT NULL,
    index SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_course_section_topics PRIMARY KEY (course_section_topic_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topics_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topics_course_section_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_id) REFERENCES course_sections(course_section_id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_course_section_topics_course_section_id_index UNIQUE (course_section_id, index) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
);

CREATE INDEX idx_course_section_topics_course_id ON course_section_topics USING BTREE (course_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_course_section_topics_course_section_id ON course_section_topics USING BTREE (course_section_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_course_section_topics_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON course_section_topics FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

CREATE TABLE user_topic_progresses (
    -- クエリ効率のため非正規化
    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    course_section_id UUID NOT NULL,
    course_section_topic_id UUID NOT NULL,
    user_id UUID NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_user_topic_progresses PRIMARY KEY (course_section_topic_id, user_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_id) REFERENCES course_sections(course_section_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topic_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_topic_id) REFERENCES course_section_topics(course_section_topic_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id)
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN user_topic_progresses.status IS 'IN_PROGRESS = 開始済み, COMPLETED = 完了済み, 開始していない場合はレコード自体がないので値として持たない';

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_section_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_section_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_section_topic_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_section_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_user_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (user_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_user_topic_progress_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON user_topic_progresses FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

message.content: sectionNumber と topicNumber の初期値は 0 だから default はいらない？それともそれ以外のケースは 0 と明示した方がいい？

content.text:
`lastTopic()` が返す `status` は `"COMPLETED"`、`"IN_PROGRESS"`、`"NOT_STARTED"` の3値固定で、`"NOT_STARTED"` のとき 0 が正しい挙動です。初期値と一致しても **意図を明示する方が安全**なので `default` は残す方が良いと思います。

将来 `status` に新しい値が増えたときに暗黙的にフォールスルーせず、コードレビューで気づきやすくなります。
